Successfully installed gpuwrf-0.0.0

usage: gpuwrf [-h] <command> ...

GPU-native WRF-compatible regional NWP. Run a forecast through the JAX GPU
port over a CPU-WRF/Gen2 backfill case.

positional arguments:
  <command>
    run       run a forecast through the GPU port and (optionally) dimension-
              compare vs CPU-WRF

options:
  -h, --help  show this help message and exit

usage: gpuwrf run [-h] --namelist NAMELIST --input-dir INPUT_DIR
                  --output-dir OUTPUT_DIR [--domain DOMAIN] [--hours HOURS]
                  [--proof-dir PROOF_DIR] [--compare-cpu-dir COMPARE_CPU_DIR]
                  [--score]

Run a forecast through the JAX GPU port. Reads a CPU-WRF/Gen2 run directory
(--input-dir), advances --hours hours, and writes wrfout history files plus
proof JSON under --output-dir. Optionally compares the generated wrfout
dimensions against a CPU-WRF reference directory.

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --namelist NAMELIST   WRF namelist.input to validate fail-closed before the
                        run (must be the <input-dir>/namelist.input).
                        (default: None)
  --input-dir INPUT_DIR
                        CPU-WRF/Gen2 run directory: source of IC, boundaries,
                        land/SST, and (by default) the CPU reference wrfouts.
                        (default: None)
  --output-dir OUTPUT_DIR
                        Directory for generated wrfout files and the run
                        payload. (default: None)
  --domain DOMAIN       Domain id to run (e.g. d02). (default: d02)
  --hours HOURS         Number of forecast hours to advance. (default: 1)
  --proof-dir PROOF_DIR
                        Directory for proof JSON. Defaults to <output-
                        dir>/proofs. (default: None)
  --compare-cpu-dir COMPARE_CPU_DIR
                        CPU-WRF reference directory for the dimension compare.
                        If omitted, no dimension compare is run; pass --input-
                        dir to compare against the case's own CPU wrfouts.
                        (default: None)
  --score               Also score against AEMET station observations (needs
                        GPUWRF_AEMET_ROOT; not part of the README runnability
                        gate). (default: False)
